scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AlphaFold, ColabFold, Boltz, Chai-1, ESM, ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, MSA generation, structure prediction outputs, protein backbone generation, binder design, and sequence design.
scenarios.role: Use ProteinMPNN to design protein sequences from backbones, prepare constraint JSONL inputs, interpret scores/probability outputs, retrain models, and use custom checkpoints in a local ProteinMPNN checkout.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `protein-mpnn` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: constraint inputs, inference design, and training custom models.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `protein-mpnn` when the request names `protein-mpnn`, centers on Use ProteinMPNN to design protein sequences from backbones, prepare constraint JSONL inputs, interpret scores/probability outputs, retrain models, and use custom checkpoints in a local ProteinMPNN checkout, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in protein structure prediction and design workflows. Then route to constraint inputs, inference design, or training custom models when those focused workflows match.
